/usr/sbin/c++ -fPIC  -fopenmp -O3 -DNDEBUG -flto=auto -fno-fat-lto-objects -shared -Wl,-soname,librife-ncnn-vulkan.so -o librife-ncnn-vulkan.so "CMakeFiles/rife-ncnn-vulkan.dir/rife.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/rife-ncnn-vulkan.dir/warp.cpp.o"  /lib/libvulkan.so ncnn/src/libncnn.a /usr/lib/libgomp.so /usr/lib/libpthread.a /lib/libvulkan.so ncnn/glslang/glslang/libglslang.a ncnn/glslang/SPIRV/libSPIRV.a ncnn/glslang/glslang/libMachineIndependent.a ncnn/glslang/OGLCompilersDLL/libOGLCompiler.a ncnn/glslang/glslang/OSDependent/Unix/libOSDependent.a ncnn/glslang/glslang/libGenericCodeGen.a
